title: glyceria distans var. pseudodistans
intro: Glyceria distans var. pseudodistans, also known as pseudodistant mannagrasse, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to North America. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. Consuming Glyceria distans var. pseudodistans has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an herbal tea or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
